items.title: Bristol, York and UNSW get approval to set up campuses in India
items.summary: Setting up of these campuses in India marks important step in advancing the internationalisation of education vision of NEP 2020, says Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: A Day After Predicting Peace, Trump Says U.S. Will Strike Iran Again
items.summary: For weeks, the president has swung between predicting peace and threatening a return to full-scale war, leaving it unclear when or how the fight with Iran might end.
